name: Whirlwind Fur Hire
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>飆</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ひょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>風</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ふう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>空</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>くう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>牙</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>が</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>団</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>だん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: If you control no monsters: Special Summon 1 Level 4 or lower monster "Fur Hire" from your Deck, then if your opponent controls 2 or more monsters, you can Special Summon 1 monster "Fur Hire" from your Deck, also for the rest of this turn, you cannot Special Summon, except monsters "Fur Hire". If you would discard to activate the effect of a monster "Fur Hire", you can banish this card from your GY instead of 1 of those cards. You can only use each effect of "Whirlwind Fur Hire" once per turn.
eff: If you control no monsters: Special Summon 1 Level 4 or lower monster "Fur Hire" from your Deck, then if your opponent controls 2 or more monsters, you can Special Summon 1 monster "Fur Hire" from your Deck, also for the rest of this turn, you cannot Special Summon, except monsters "Fur Hire". If you would discard to activate the effect of a monster "Fur Hire", you can banish this card from your GY instead of 1 of those cards. You can only use each effect of "Whirlwind Fur Hire" once per turn.

summoning: Restricts the player's Special Summons to archetype specific monsters
